3042660.name: 悪役令嬢は隣国の王太子に溺愛される
3042660.description:
The sweet and tender love by the prince awaits you―

This game is based on the popular girls novel “The Villainess Is Adored by the Prince of the Neighbor Kingdom” Volume 1-3. Enjoy the full voice acting by famous voice actors and high-quality still images! There will be alternate endings compared to the original novel depending on the choices you make throughout the story.

Also stay tuned for the “What If” original bonus love stories with you and the conquest characters♡

◆Summary◆

“Am I…inside my favorite otome game!?”

The main character had reincarnated to the world of “The Ring of Lapis Lazuli”, her favorite otome game―but as the villainess, Tiara Rose.

The story progresses accordingly to the original otome game, and her engagement with Prince Hartknights, the crown prince from Lapis Lazuli, breaks off.

However, a sweet and surprising plot twist occurs when Aquasteed, the crown prince of the neighboring country Marinforest, suddenly appears to propose a marriage to her.

◆Character Voice ◆

The protagonist is a reincarnated villainess from the Otome game “The Ring of Lapis Lazuli”.

She has a serious personality and is not immune to romance. She loves eating and making sweets. She is an avid reader.

She was supposed to be deported after her engagement was broken by her country's crown prince, Hartknights, but she was proposed to by Aquasteed of a neighboring country.

The crown prince of the neighboring country Marine Forest has come to study abroad in the Lapis Lazuli Kingdom.

He was in love with Tiararose, but kept his feelings a secret because she had a fiancé.

Good at swords and magic.

The crown prince of the Lapis Lazuli Kingdom. He is Tiararose's fiancée, but ......?

He is cold to his fiancée, Tiararose, because Akari, the heroine of the Otome game “The Ring of Lapis Lazuli” has already conquered her. She has a side of naivete.

The heroine of the otome game “The Ring of Lapis Lazuli”.

An innocent and innocent personality. She is so free-spirited that people around her are turned on by her. She like handsome men.

A duke's daughter who is loved by the sea fairies in Marine Forest. The heroine of the sequel to “The Ring of Lapis Lazuli”.

A young lady who is both graceful and gentle. Since she is only 14 years old, she doesn't know what love is.

One of the three fairy kings in the Marine Forest Kingdom. The fairy king of the forest.

Selfish, but dependable when the need arises. He likes Tiararose and wants her to be mine whenever the opportunity arises.

One of the three fairy kings in the Marine Forest Kingdom. Fairy King of the Sky.

He has a cheerful atmosphere and a cheerful personality, He can be very scary when he is angry.

One of the three fairy kings in the Marine Forest Kingdom. Sea fairy king.

Always grumpy and unfriendly. There's something she doesn't like, and he hates Tiararose.

Daughter of Baron Sunfist's family. Tiararose's faithful maid.

She is very caring and cares about Tiararose very much.

Aquasteed's excellent aide. Serious and sincere.

A nice young man with good people. He is very considerate and always plays a supporting role for Aquasteed.

*Voice will be Japanese-only

---------------------------------------

◆Update Information

December 13, 2024 Translation corrected and updated.
